title: The Iron Giant Moves Again
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Lilith, Atlas as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You chose death... was passing on your research that important?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You fools!! Did you really expect someone to be curious enough to follow in your footsteps after this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Biz

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Someone once told me that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: *The voices of the past call out to you*...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: History is written by the victors...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and the words of the vanquished are usually cast into a deep, dark ocean...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That being said, their truth can still come to light...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If the oppressed carry it on their backs and endure!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey!! What are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For my part, I am leaving this to the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: hurry and blast off!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's no good! We can't!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That old centaur is gonna keep attacking!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're finished if he does!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This ship can only fly for a kilometer...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the geezer disrupts our trajectory, even a little, we won't make it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The wind's blowing north, and that's reducing our lift. Any further jolts will make us fall short of our projected landing zone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: According to my calculations, if we miss the ocean, our damages will be critical!! We have to get rid of him first!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WHATA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Uwaah H!!!

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: Lilith!!

dialogue.speaker: Atlas
dialogue.text: Atlas?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you... why did you do that to illicit?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
